changeSet.author: nexus-dcqml
changeSet.comment: Backfill catalog_collections stub rows for every collection name referenced by document_aspects, aspect_extraction_queue, topics, taxonomy_meta, and document_highlights (non-null) that is not already registered.

changeSet.author: nexus-dcqml
changeSet.comment: document_aspects_collection_fk: FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, collection) REFERENCES nexus.catalog_collections (tenant_id, name) ON DELETE RESTRICT NOT VALID.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.document_aspects ADD CONSTRAINT document_aspects_collection_fk FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, collection) REFERENCES nexus.catalog_collections (tenant_id, name) ON DELETE RESTRICT NOT VALID;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE nexus.document_aspects DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS document_aspects_collection_fk;

changeSet.author: nexus-dcqml
changeSet.comment: aspect_extraction_queue_collection_fk: FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, collection) REFERENCES nexus.catalog_collections (tenant_id, name) ON DELETE RESTRICT NOT VALID.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.aspect_extraction_queue ADD CONSTRAINT aspect_extraction_queue_collection_fk FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, collection) REFERENCES nexus.catalog_collections (tenant_id, name) ON DELETE RESTRICT NOT VALID;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE nexus.aspect_extraction_queue DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS aspect_extraction_queue_collection_fk;

changeSet.author: nexus-dcqml
changeSet.comment: topics_collection_fk: FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, collection) REFERENCES nexus.catalog_collections (tenant_id, name) ON DELETE RESTRICT NOT VALID.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.topics ADD CONSTRAINT topics_collection_fk FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, collection) REFERENCES nexus.catalog_collections (tenant_id, name) ON DELETE RESTRICT NOT VALID;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE nexus.topics DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS topics_collection_fk;

changeSet.author: nexus-dcqml
changeSet.comment: taxonomy_meta_collection_fk: FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, collection) REFERENCES nexus.catalog_collections (tenant_id, name) ON DELETE RESTRICT NOT VALID.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.taxonomy_meta ADD CONSTRAINT taxonomy_meta_collection_fk FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, collection) REFERENCES nexus.catalog_collections (tenant_id, name) ON DELETE RESTRICT NOT VALID;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE nexus.taxonomy_meta DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS taxonomy_meta_collection_fk;

changeSet.author: nexus-dcqml
changeSet.comment: document_highlights_collection_fk: FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, collection) REFERENCES nexus.catalog_collections (tenant_id, name) ON DELETE RESTRICT NOT VALID. collection is NULLABLE: MATCH SIMPLE means null-collection rows escape the FK and rely on the fk-001 catalog_documents ON DELETE CASCADE instead.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.document_highlights ADD CONSTRAINT document_highlights_collection_fk FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, collection) REFERENCES nexus.catalog_collections (tenant_id, name) ON DELETE RESTRICT NOT VALID;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE nexus.document_highlights DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS document_highlights_collection_fk;
